overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dark futuristic corporate facility with intense red and cyan neon lighting. The player moves through narrow industrial corridors, enters a conference room with NPCs, continues through office areas with glass partitions, and ends in a control room with holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with red neon lighting

events.description: approaching and entering glass door into conference room

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow industrial corridor with red neon walls

entered.detail: metal security door with red accent lighting at corridor entrance
vertical red neon light tubes running along industrial pipes
low cyan LED strips illuminating the floor edge
exposed industrial piping with red neon glow
metal grate flooring with geometric pattern

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial corridor bathed in red neon light from exposed pipes on the right wall. The camera moves forward over metal grating flooring toward a glass security door, with cyan accent lights visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate conference room with glass walls

events.description: transition from red neon corridor to white overhead lighting in conference room
camera pans around the room observing seated individuals at the table

agents.ego_description: entering the conference room and looking around at the seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: seated at the far end of the conference table facing the camera

entered.detail: large rectangular conference table with reflective surface
black office chairs arranged around the conference table
floor-to-ceiling glass partitions with metal frames
long white LED light fixtures on the ceiling
digital screens displaying data on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a modern conference room with white overhead lighting contrasting the previous red corridor. A large table dominates the center with NPCs seated around it, while glass walls reveal adjacent spaces. The camera pans to survey the room before heading toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: exiting the conference room back into narrow dark corridors

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit service corridors with red indicator lights

entered.detail: dark painted metal wall panels with minimal lighting
small red LED indicators spaced along the corridor
tight corridor with pipes and conduits visible

segments.scene_description: Exiting the conference room, the scene returns to narrow dark corridors with red emergency lighting. The camera moves through industrial passages with metal walls and grated flooring, transitioning between tight turns and straight sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate office floor with glass partitions and neon art

events.description: corridor opens into wide office area with glass-walled cubicles and NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the office floor passing groups of NPCs and glass-walled offices

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing near the glass wall

entered.detail: transparent glass walls separating office spaces with metal frames
long fluorescent light bars suspended from ceiling
dark tiled floor with geometric hexagonal pattern
individual offices with glass fronts showing interior desks
thick support pillars with dark finish
red neon art piece resembling branching coral or lightning

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a spacious office floor with glass-walled cubicles and scattered groups of NPCs. The flooring changes to patterned tiles while overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the area. The camera passes by a striking red neon sculpture and continues past glass offices where NPCs are visible working inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-lit corridor leading to server control room

events.description: entering the final control room with blue holographic monitors

agents.ego_description: walking through red neon corridor and entering the control room with monitoring stations

notable_agents.action: solitary figure walking ahead in the corridor before the control room

entered.detail: intense red neon tubes running vertically along corridor walls
metal flooring with raised geometric pattern
metal security gate marking entrance to control room
banks of blue-lit holographic screens and displays
desks with chairs facing the monitor walls
glowing cyan-blue digital displays showing data readouts

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a corridor with intense red neon tube lighting on the walls, transitioning from the office area. The camera passes a security gate and enters a control room filled with blue holographic monitors and workstation consoles, ending with a view of the illuminated screen arrays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a corporate facility that shifts from claustrophobic industrial corridors to open office spaces and finally into a high-tech control center. It begins in a narrow hallway bathed in red neon light, moving over metal grating toward a glass security door where cyan accents emerge in the distance. As the camera passes through the door, the environment opens into a brightly lit conference room with white overhead lighting and seated NPCs before transitioning back into dark, red-lit industrial passages. The scene then expands into a spacious office floor characterized by patterned tiles, fluorescent lights, and glass-walled cubicles, passing a striking red neon sculpture. Finally, the camera moves through a corridor of intense red tube lighting and a security gate to enter a control room filled with blue holographic monitors and illuminated workstation consoles.
